ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "tripduration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in seconds */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the start station */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the end station */,
  "bikeid" INTEGER /* ID of the bike used */,
  "usertype" INTEGER /* Type of user (0 for subscriber, 1 for casual) */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Birth year of the user */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the user (1 for male, 2 for female) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the trip started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the trip ended */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather record */,
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_bikeid FOREIGN KEY ("bikeid") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_traffic_id FOREIGN KEY ("traffic_id") REFERENCES traffic ("traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Number of docks available at the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the station (active, under maintenance, etc.) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the station data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "bike_type" TEXT /* Type of the bike */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bike (available or unavailable) */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "last_crash_date" TEXT /* Date of the last crash */,
  "total_trips" INTEGER /* Total number of trips the bike has completed */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance covered by the bike */,
  "last_location" TEXT /* Last known location of the bike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "usertype" INTEGER /* Type of user (0 for subscriber, 1 for casual) */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Points accumulated through loyalty programs */,
  "preferred_stations" TEXT /* List of preferred stations */,
  "preferred_bike_types" TEXT /* List of preferred bike types */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_trips" (
  "user_trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user trip */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip */,
  "trip_date" TEXT /* Date of the trip */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the trip started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the trip ended */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance covered in the trip */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather record */,
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_trips_traffic_id FOREIGN KEY ("traffic_id") REFERENCES traffic ("traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_trips_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_trips_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_trips_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_trips_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the program started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the program ends */,
  "points_required" INTEGER /* Points required to enroll in the program */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Description of the benefits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_program_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the user in the program */,
  "points_redeemed" INTEGER /* Points redeemed by the user in the program */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (active, expired, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Personalized recommendation for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was created */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of recommendation (e.g., promotional, informational) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation (sent, opened, etc.) */,
  "engagement" INTEGER /* User engagement with the recommendation (e.g., clicked, ignored) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crashes" (
  "crash_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crash */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike involved */,
  "crash_date" TEXT /* Date of the crash */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the crash */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the crash (if known) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the crash (minor, moderate, severe) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the crash */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crash_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crashes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crashes_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenances" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance (if applicable) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "parts_replaced" TEXT /* List of parts replaced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenances_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenances_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather record */,
  "temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the traffic record */,
  "traffic_volume" INTEGER /* Traffic volume */,
  "congestion_level" TEXT /* Level of congestion (low, medium, high) */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of traffic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "expected_attendance" INTEGER /* Expected number of attendees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media post */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the social media post */,
  "post" TEXT /* Text of the social media post */,
  "engagement" INTEGER /* Engagement metrics (e.g. likes, comments) */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the post was made (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the post */,
  "reactions" INTEGER /* Number of reactions (likes, comments, shares) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "system" TEXT /* Name of the system being integrated */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the integration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the integration */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (API, webhook, etc.) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (active, inactive, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)
